title: Profile and optimize mid-range buffer operations (8-64 words)
description: Investigate whether mid-range buffer operations (8-64 words) can be further optimized. Current performance is already 10-12 GiB/s across all sizes. Profiling plan: 1) Profile real workloads, 2) Microbenchmark unroll factors, 3) Test BitSlice zero-copy operations. Decision: proceed only if >15% speedup on real workloads.
